title: Make README dnf command copy-pastable
body: There are EOL spaces in the README preventing the `dnf install` command from being used in copy-pasta.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@j00bar can you sign your commit (should be as simple as "git commit -s --amend") and re-push?
Oh, man... uh... I'll probably have to go generate a new set of keys... let me see what I can do.
No worries, I misspoke.  CI just needs a "Signed-off By:" in the commit message, which isn't actually a digital signature.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/ab9bbe032b401d98fc09be6571195f1a7d6422f1.1496178682957219328/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
